title: Fix member login failure

requirements.text: Fix the member login flow so that submitting a valid membership ID on the MemberLoginPage successfully authenticates the member, persists the login state to localStorage via useMemberAuth, and navigates to the MemberDashboard without error.
acceptanceCriteria: Entering a valid membership ID and submitting the form on MemberLoginPage does not show a login error.
On successful login, the member is redirected to the MemberDashboard page.
The member's auth state is persisted to localStorage and survives a page refresh.
If the membership ID is invalid or not found, an appropriate error message is shown without crashing the app.
The MemberDashboardGuard in App.tsx correctly reads the persisted localStorage auth state and allows access to the dashboard route.

requirements.text: Audit and fix the backend getMemberByMembershipId (or equivalent) query/validation logic to ensure it correctly returns member data when queried with a valid membership ID, and that the frontend useMemberAuth hook properly handles the backend response (including any optional/null result variants).
acceptanceCriteria: The backend returns the correct member record when queried with a valid membership ID.
The backend returns a clear null/error variant when the membership ID is not found.
The useMemberAuth hook in the frontend correctly interprets both success and failure responses from the backend without throwing unhandled errors.
The MemberLoginPage displays the correct error state when the backend returns a not-found response.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing admin login and Internet Identity authentication flows — only the member login path should be changed.
nonGoals: UI redesign of the login page
Changes to attendance, diet, workout, or video features
